tasks.title: Add survey schema to pipelinq_register.json
tasks.description: Add the survey schema with Schema.org type schema:Survey and all required properties.
acceptance_criteria: survey schema exists with all properties (title, description, questions, status, token, linkedEntityType, linkedEntityId, activeFrom, activeUntil, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)

tasks.title: Add surveyResponse schema to pipelinq_register.json
tasks.description: Add the surveyResponse schema with Schema.org type schema:CompletedSurvey.
acceptance_criteria: surveyResponse schema exists with all properties (surveyId, answers, respondentId, entityType, entityId, completedAt, ipHash)

tasks.title: Add schema config keys to SettingsService and SchemaMapService
tasks.description: Add survey_schema and surveyResponse_schema config keys.
acceptance_criteria: SettingsService exposes survey_schema and surveyResponse_schema keys
SchemaMapService includes mappings for both schemas

tasks.title: Create PublicSurveyController
tasks.description: Create controller extending PublicShareController with show and submit methods.
acceptance_criteria: show() returns survey data excluding sensitive fields for active surveys

tasks.title: Register public routes
tasks.description: Register routes for public survey endpoints.

tasks.title: Implement token validation and status checks
tasks.description: Implement validation for invalid tokens, inactive surveys, missing answers, unconfigured system.
acceptance_criteria: Returns 404 with throttle for invalid token

tasks.title: Create surveyStore with CRUD actions
tasks.description: Create Pinia store with CRUD actions for surveys and responses.
acceptance_criteria: fetchSurveys, fetchSurvey, createSurvey, updateSurvey, deleteSurvey actions exist

tasks.title: Add NPS and satisfaction computed getters
tasks.description: Add computed getters for NPS score, satisfaction average, response count, completion rate.
acceptance_criteria: satisfactionAverage getter returns mean of ratings rounded to one decimal
Both return null with no responses

tasks.title: Register store in store.js
tasks.description: Register surveyStore in the main store configuration.
acceptance_criteria: surveyStore is importable and initialized via store.js

tasks.title: Create SurveyList view
tasks.description: Create SurveyList Vue component listing surveys.
acceptance_criteria: Lists all surveys with title, status, response count
Supports navigation to detail and create views

tasks.title: Create SurveyDetail view
acceptance_criteria: Links to analytics and edit views

tasks.title: Create SurveyForm with QuestionEditor
acceptance_criteria: Form supports create and edit modes
QuestionEditor allows type selection (nps, rating, multiple_choice, open_text, yes_no)
Each question has label, required flag, options for multiple choice

tasks.title: Create SurveyAnalytics with CSV export
tasks.description: Create SurveyAnalytics with response statistics and export.
acceptance_criteria: Shows NPS score, satisfaction average, response count, completion rate

tasks.title: Create PublicSurveyForm
tasks.description: Create public survey form for unauthenticated respondents.
acceptance_criteria: Renders survey questions for unauthenticated respondents

tasks.title: Add Surveys menu item to navigation
tasks.description: Add Surveys item to Pipelinq navigation menu.
acceptance_criteria: Surveys menu item visible in navigation for authenticated users

tasks.title: Add survey routes to router
tasks.description: Add all survey routes to Vue router.

tasks.title: Write PublicSurveyController unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests covering all PublicSurveyController scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Tests for show (active, inactive, not found)
Tests for submit (missing answers, not configured)

tasks.title: Add survey and surveyResponse seed data
tasks.description: Add seed data for survey and surveyResponse schemas.
acceptance_criteria: 5 response objects with varied NPS/rating values
